details.title: Cloud API Registry Viewer
details.description: Read-only access to Cloud API Registry resources.

details.title: Cloud KMS Expert PQ Asymmetric Signing Key Manager
details.description: Enables PQ asymmetric signing key management.

details.title: Cloud KMS single-tenant HSM Executor
details.description: Grants ability to execute SingleTenantHsmInstanceProposal resources.

details.title: Cloud KMS single-tenant HSM Key Creator
details.description: Grants ability to use single-tenant HSM instances to create keys. This role must be combined with another role that grants the ability to create cryptoKeys.

details.title: Cloud KMS single-tenant HSM Proposer
details.description: Grants ability to create SingleTenantHsmInstances and SingleTenantHsmInstanceProposals.

details.title: Cloud KMS single-tenant HSM Quorum Member
details.description: Grants ability to approve SingleTenantHsmInstanceProposal resources.

details.title: Advisory Support Editor
details.description: Full read-write access to advisory support cases applicable for GCP Customer Care.

details.title: Advisory Support Viewer
details.description: Read-only access to advisory support cases applicable for GCP Customer Care.

details.title: Confidential GKE Workload User
details.description: Grants the ability to generate a GKE attestation token and run a workload in a GKE cluster.

details.title: Cloud Infrastructure Manager Editor
details.description: Edit access to Cloud Infrastructure Manager resources.

details.title: Workforce Scheduling Shift Generator
details.description: Access to generating shifts using Workforce Scheduling.

details.title: Database Insights intelligence viewer
details.description: Viewer role for Database Insights intelligence data

details.title: Database Insights virtual Dbx viewer
details.description: Viewer role for Database Insights virtual Dbx data

details.title: Code Scheduler
details.description: Access for scheduling workflows and releases.

details.title: Team Folder Commenter
details.description: View and comment access to a team folder and its contents.

details.title: Team Folder Contributor
details.description: Edit access to a team folder and its contents.

details.title: Team Folder Creator
details.description: Access to create new team folders.

details.title: Team Folder Owner
details.description: Full access to a team folder and its contents. Can share the team folder and its contents.

details.title: Team Folder Viewer
details.description: View access to a team folder and its contents.

details.title: Dataplex Data Products Consumer
details.description: Restricted read access, intended for consumers of Data Products.

details.title: Dataplex Metadata Feed Owner
details.description: Grants access to creating and managing Metadata Feeds. Does not give the right to create/modify Entry Groups.

details.title: Dataplex Metadata Feed Viewer
details.description: Read access to Metadata Feed resources.

details.title: Developer Connect HTTP Proxy Writer
details.description: Grants read and write access to connections through the HTTP Proxy.

details.title: Gemini Enterprise Restricted User
details.description: Grants restricted user-level access to Gemini Enterprise resources, for fine-grained control over multiple Gemini Enterprise instances in the same project. Principals with this role will need to be granted an unrestricted user-level role (e.g. /agentspaceUser) on an Engine policy in order to use Gemini Enterprise.

details.title: Edge Container Service Account Key Viewer
details.description: Access to view Service Account Keys.

details.title: Edge Container Roles Viewer
details.description: Read-only access to Roles in the zone.

details.title: Gemini Data Analytics Query Data User
details.description: Access to use Gemini Data Analytics query data.

details.title: Generative Language Service Agent
details.description: Grants Generative Language Service Agent permissions required to read data from GCS buckets

details.title: Cluster Director Service Agent
details.description: Grants Cluster Director Service Agent access to necessary GCP resources.

details.title: Cluster Director Shared VPC Service Agent
details.description: Grants Cluster Director Service Agent access to necessary GCP resources in Shared VPC host project.

details.title: Access Policy Admin
details.description: Access Policy admin role, with permissions to read and modify access policies, and to bind and unbind access policies to targets

details.title: Access Policy User
details.description: Access Policies user role, with permissions to view access policies, and to bind and unbind access policies to targets

details.title: Access Policy Viewer
details.description: Access Policy Viewer role, with permissions to read  access policies and view associated policy bindings
